Content 1
Join the HP Leadership team live to unlock the full potential of your technology investments.

Work is evolving from routine tasks to high-impact contributions driven by AI. Enterprises are embracing this shift and creating dynamic, empowering and purpose driven workplaces where people can thrive and business become more competitive.
What you'll gain (and why it matters now)

Elevated employee experiences
Insight led digital employee engagement that fuels business growth

Integrated view of the modern workplace
Scalable IT Solutions that remove complexity and help design for the future

Peer-led AI Outcomes
Real world AI workflows and data-driven use cases for operational impact

Experience the future of work in action
Interact directly with One HP solutions, guided by on-stand experts
Event Agenda

15:45-17:00
Registration & Lunch
Network with peers and industry leaders shaping the future workplace with buffet lunch.

The Future of Work is Now
Corbett Hoxland, Chief Technologist, HP Inc.
Understand how AI and digital transformation strategy is delivering competitive business advantage.

Accelerate the Future of Work: The Ideal Employee Digital Experience (DEX) for Modern Enterprise
Ruth Patterson, Managing Director, HP UK&I
Discover how leading organisations are enhancing employee experience to drive productivity and enable hybrid work, with insights from the HP Work Relationship Index.

Designing the Intelligent Workplace with Workforce Experience Platform (WXP)
Mike Hann, VP, Digital Services Strategy & Operations, HP Inc. & Larry Meadows, Product Strategy & Evangelism, HP Workforce Experience Platform, HP Inc.
Hear how the vendor agnostic platform empowers IT to deliver seamless, secure, and insight-driven workplace environments for optimum employee experience.

AI Envisioning and the Future of Work Roadmap Microsoft Business Leader
Explore how to align AI innovation with a clear, future-focused strategy for the evolving workplace.

Refreshment Break

The Future of Humanity and AI (Keynote)
Matthew Griffin, Futurist & Strategic Advisor
A thought leadership perspective on how AI is reshaping the relationship between people and work, enabling a more connected workforce.

Customer Experience: Insight to Impact (Fireside Chat)

AI Now: From Reality to Roadmap (Expert Panel)
Moderated by Ruth Patterson, Managing Director, HP UK&I, with expert subject matter leaders
How to scale AI from real use cases to enterprise-wide impact, why it matters now.

ONE HP Future of Work LIVE Experience & Networking EXPO
Step into a live HP powered tech environment at Wrexham FC, and experience hands-on demos with experts across the future of work exhibition.

SECURE YOUR PLACE

Register now to secure your place
